title: Single coder delivery
summary: One bounded implementation lane with delivery review and frozen verification.
useWhen: Requirements are clear enough to dispatch
avoidWhen: The task cannot yet be bounded
Multiple independent surfaces need parallel lanes

phases.intent: Confirm workspace binding, registry, and that the task is bounded.
adaptations: Skip delivery mode for a read-only task

phases.intent: Dispatch one bounded task to an eligible coder with delivery mode.
adaptations: Use delivery spec for code changes

phases.intent: Observe the coder via run_wait until terminal or liveness warrants action.
adaptations: Continue waiting if progress is fresh

phases.intent: Collect bounded output, review delivery paths, and make one decision.
adaptations: Tester only for risk or insufficient evidence

escalation.advisor: Only for one named unresolved design question.
escalation.auditor: Only for one named residual high-risk acceptance question.
